description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

Quanta Cure is an AI-driven drug discovery framework using Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to model molecular structures and predict proteinligand binding affinity. It integrates RDKit, PyTorch Geometric, and datasets like ChEMBL and PDBBind to build molecular graphs for machine learningbased drug candidate screening.

Supply chain delays cause major financial losses. This project uses machine learning to identify high-risk routes, giving operators a targeted, data-driven framework to strategically invest in IoT infrastructure, reduce delays, and protect profits.

Strat-ML: S&P 500 Alpha Generation Framework:- This repository contains a complete quantitative pipeline designed to outperform the S&P 500 Index using Machine Learning. The project focuses on out-of-sample signal generation using constituent-level OHLCV data, rigorous Blocking Time Series Cross-Validation, and a Long/Short Stock Picking strategy.

This repository contains all Deep Learning laboratory assignments completed during the semester. Each folder represents an individual lab covering different deep learning concepts, implementations, and experiments performed using Python and relevant machine learning frameworks.
